summary: Phase 23 testing — Google Drive File Storage, expo-audio migration, DriveSetupSheet, case-files API. All backend tests pass (8/8). Critical bug found and fixed: useAppContext not exported from AppContext (caused red screen on case detail). After fix, all frontend features verified working.

react_native_issues.issue: Both files imported `useAppContext` from AppContext but AppContext only exported `useApp`. This caused a red screen error on case detail page and voice-notes page. Fixed by adding `export const useAppContext = useApp` alias in AppContext.tsx.

action_items: Verify the useAppContext alias fix is acceptable or rename imports in VoiceNotesSection.tsx and voice-notes.tsx to use useApp directly
Note: expo-av deprecation warnings still appear in logs from expo-notifications but not from voice/audio code — these are harmless SDK warnings unrelated to Phase 23 changes
critical_code_review_comments: VoiceNotesSection.tsx and voice-notes.tsx used `useAppContext` but AppContext only exported `useApp` — caused runtime crash. Fixed with alias export.
AppContext.tsx is 1125 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into smaller modules.
EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID is a placeholder ('REPLACE_WITH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID') — Drive OAuth will gracefully fail but UI renders correctly

success_rate.frontend: 95% — all features work: DriveSetupSheet shows/dismisses, Record btn triggers sheet, Settings STORAGE section, voice-notes screen with banner. One bug fixed (useAppContext crash)

seed_data_creation: None — used existing test data (case-1, State vs Rajesh Sharma)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 23 features all verified: (1) expo-audio migration works — no expo-av crashes, (2) DriveSetupSheet shows when Drive not connected for both Add Doc and Record actions, dismisses with Maybe Later, (3) Settings STORAGE section has Google Drive row with Connect button, (4) Voice notes screen shows Drive banner and start-recording-btn, (5) Backend case-files CRUD API fully tested. Key fix applied: useAppContext alias added to AppContext.tsx.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: Phase 23 migration introduced `useAppContext` call in VoiceNotesSection.tsx (line 54) and voice-notes.tsx (line 49), but AppContext.tsx only exported `useApp`. The two new files were not updated to use the correct hook name. Fix: Added `export const useAppContext = useApp` alias at end of AppContext.tsx. This is a simple naming inconsistency introduced during the phase.
